code: import axios from'axios';const API_BASE='http://localhost:5000';export const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});export const get=path=>api.get(path);export const post=(path,body)=>api.post(path,body);export const put=(path,body)=>api.put(path,body);export const remove=path=>api.delete(path);
